required_properties.description: The name of the how-to guide.
The steps to complete the task. Each step should be a HowToStep with text.

recommended_properties.description: A description of the how-to guide.
An image illustrating the how-to guide.
Total time to complete the task in ISO 8601 duration format.

deprecation_note: Google retired HowTo rich results in August 2024. This markup will not generate rich results but is still valid Schema.org and can be used for semantic purposes.
